en: A: How is the weather today?
The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: ljamaljeqel aravac, sa itungu a pakaliyaw.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it's windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?

ab: inika ljaljeqeleqel inika zemulezulezul, sarenguaq a racac.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.
A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: neka nu qerepus, mapacucun anga a vitjuqan.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadavan nua i casaw?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: tjaumeljai, maqadaw anga, sa tjevuta anga a quljivangaraw.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: tjau maka qudjalj, sa maqadaw anga, sa puquljivangaraw anga.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.
A: What's the weather like where you are?
B: We're going to have a big storm here.
A: How's the weather there?
B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: uri vaik anga ken a kitulu.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: ljemaljeqel aravac, sa itungu a pakaliyaw.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I'm going out.

ab: ki qemudjalj a paljaqaca nu sauni, paqenetju a masi ljaung.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: cemlalalalaq anga, ki qemudjalj nu sauni.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.
A: Is it raining?

ab: na qemudjalj ta sauni, sa meljai anga tucu.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: matu na qemudjalj anga, tjevetjeveng a djalan.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: na qemudjalj? Aqu sun a tjevetjeveng a penulingelingetj?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: qemudjaqudjalj a i casaw, ini aken a namasi ljaung.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: Are you all right?
A: Are you all right?

ab: paljaqaca aravac sa vali, lemutud a ku qulu tua ku kinipavalian.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
A: Are you all right?

ab: maqadaw aravac, vucengel a ku qulu tua ku kinipaqadavan.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
